MK knitting kit root + MK other root — user wants deeper analysis before any pause decision. User believes knitting root has potential. Currently both at $0-6 spend/30d.

improvement_assessment.summary: First deep dive. Portfolio restructured: Auto funded aggressively ($6→$20), biggest bleeder (SK loom kit) strategy-switched, MK broad TOS waste reduced, 5 dormant campaigns unlocked with PP/ROS, PT self-targeting removed. Expected impact: Auto should generate 2-3x more profitable orders, overall ACoS should improve toward 35-40% target within 2-3 weeks.
improvement_assessment.risk_areas: PP/ROS conversion is unproven for this portfolio — user flagged as test run. Loom keyword rank still declining.
